diagnostics.description: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

log.content: disables many type checking rules. Its use should be avoided.

diagnostics.description: Forbidden non-null assertion after optional chaining.

message.content: Forbidden non-null assertion after optional chaining.

log.content: Optional chaining already handles nullish values. Using non-null assertion defeats its purpose and may cause runtime errors.
Consider using the nullish coalescing operator `??` or optional chaining throughout the chain instead.
